allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'Remove faculty role; add email verification, password reset, rate limiting & secrets management' --body ' *)

PowerShell($token = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("GITHUB_TOKEN", "User"\); if \(-not $token\) { $token = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("GITHUB_TOKEN", "Machine"\) }; if \($token\) { Write-Output "Token found" } else { Write-Output "No GITHUB_TOKEN set" })
